html:
Exclusive to:

A Lesser Glow Berry is a Fruit Food Item found in Don't Starve Together. It is obtained by picking a Mysterious Plant in the Caves. It takes 4 days for a Lesser Glow Berry to regrow. It restores 3 and 12.5 at the cost of 10 .

The Lesser Glow Berry performs much the same as the Glow Berry, but with less potency. A Lesser Glow Berry only refuels Moggles by 45 seconds and the afterglow side effects of eating a Lesser Glow Berry last for just 60 seconds. When dropped, they will still emit enough light to protect any Survivor from Charlie attacks.

Warly can use two Lesser Glow Berries to make Glow Berry Mousse in his Portable Crock Pot.

Recipes

×2

Fillers cannot be Meat or Twigs.

Tips

  • Feeding Lesser Glow Berries to held Rabbits, the Eye Mask, or the Shield of Terror causes them to glow even while inside a player's inventory, making them a viable source of light. This also allows Wigfrid to utilize Lesser Glow Berries even without being able to consume them.

Trivia

  • Survivor quotes for the Lesser Glow Berry are found in the game files of Don't Starve, implying that it may have been a planned feature for the original game.

Gallery

  • A Lesser Glow Berry in the character's inventory.
  • The Mysterious Plant from which the player can pick the Lesser Glow Berry.
  • Wolfgang emitting light after eating a Lesser Glow Berry.
  • One Rabbit and the Eye of Terror drops, converted into spelunking equipment with the power of Lesser Glow Berries.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

A '''Lesser Glow Berry''' is a [[Fruit]] [[Food]] [[Item]] found in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It is obtained by picking a [[Mysterious Plant]] in the [[Caves]]. It takes 4 days for a Lesser Glow Berry to regrow. It restores 3 {{Hp}} and 12.5 {{Hunger}} at the cost of 10 {{sanity}}. 

The Lesser Glow Berry performs much the same as the [[Glow Berry]], but with less potency. A Lesser Glow Berry only refuels [[Moggles]] by 45 seconds and the afterglow side effects of eating a Lesser Glow Berry last for just 60 seconds. When dropped, they will still emit enough light to protect any Survivor from [[Charlie]] attacks.

[[Warly]] can use two Lesser Glow Berries to make [[Glow Berry Mousse]] in his [[Portable Crock Pot]].
__NOTOC__
== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipes ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Lesser Glow Berry
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Fruit
|item3 = Filler
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Glow Berry Mousse
|note = Fillers cannot be [[Meat]] or [[Twigs]].}}

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* Feeding Lesser Glow Berries to held [[Rabbit]]s, the [[Eye Mask]], or the [[Shield of Terror]] causes them to glow even while inside a player's inventory, making them a viable source of light. This also allows [[Wigfrid]] to utilize Lesser Glow Berries even without being able to consume them.

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}}Trivia ==
* Survivor quotes for the Lesser Glow Berry are found in the game files of ''Don't Starve'', implying that it may have been a planned feature for the original game.
